## Summary

Restores professional branded formatting to PDF and DOCX report downloads. The current exports are functional but plain — basic Helvetica, no colors, no score visualizations. This PR transforms both formats into branded RevisionGrade documents with the canonical design palette.

Also changes the default download format from `txt` to `pdf` so the Download button delivers the professional format by default.

## What Changed

### PDF
- **Branded cover page**: gold accent bar at top, oxblood RevisionGrade™ title, tagline, gold rule dividers
- **Score circle**: centered score display with border, color-coded verdict badge below (green PASS / amber REVISE / red FAIL)
- **Section headers**: oxblood text with gold rule underlines (was: gray Helvetica with pale gray divider)
- **Criteria score bars**: visual filled bar for each criterion with green/amber/red color coding based on score value
- **Confidence mapping**: color-coded confidence labels (high=green, moderate=amber, low=red)
- **Recommendation cards**: numbered actions with effort/impact metadata labels
- **Dream/narrative synthesis**: 4-column score display (Quality/Readiness/Commercial/Literary)
- **Branded footer**: gold separator line + "RevisionGrade™ Evaluation Report — Confidential — Page N" on every page

### DOCX
- **Georgia headings in oxblood**, Calibri body text
- **Gold divider bars** via shaded table cells
- **Score + verdict display table** with large score and color-coded verdict
- **Criteria score table**: alternating row shading (warm cream), color-coded scores and confidence
- **Rationale blocks** in muted text below criteria table
- **Branded header** (right-aligned, italic) and **footer** with page numbers
- **Dream score table** with 4-column layout
- **Proper paragraph spacing** throughout

### Download Default
- Route default changed from `format=txt` to `format=pdf`
- PDF-to-TXT crash fallback preserved with `X-RevisionGrade-Export-Fallback` header

### Brand Palette (from `docs/design/revisiongrade-workspace-tokens.css`)
- Gold: `#B8922A` — dividers, accent lines
- Oxblood: `#8B2E2E` — headings, brand title
- Ink: `#1C1814` — body text
- Surface: `#FAF7F2` / `#FFFDF9` — table row alternating backgrounds
- Success/Warning/Error: `#3A6B2A` / `#8B5E1A` / `#8B2020` — score and confidence colors

## Scope

**Touches:** `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` — `buildPdfReport`, `buildDocx` functions, brand palette constants, default format parameter.

**Does NOT touch:** TXT export (unchanged), report data/scoring logic, evaluation pipeline, web UI report page, download button component.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- PDFKit score circle and verdict badge use absolute positioning — tested for LETTER size pages. If page size changes, the cover layout may need adjustment.
- DOCX `Table` with `BorderStyle.NONE` renders differently across Word versions; tested pattern is widely compatible.
- The PDF-to-TXT fallback is preserved so if pdfkit crashes, authors still get their report (as plain text with the fallback header).

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — this PR only changes the download/export rendering layer. No evaluation logic, pipeline prompts, scoring, or database changes.
